positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic, stylized fox sitting amongst glowing constellations and swirling nebula dust. The fox should have sharp, clean silhouettes and vivid, contrasting colors: deep indigo and midnight blue background contrasted with brilliant emerald green, cyan, and luminous gold accents on the fox's fur and the celestial elements. Geometric pattern elements should subtly frame the fox and the space, creating a modern, mystical, and elegant cosmic aesthetic. Minimalist, vector-pop art style with fine linework and high contrast. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, designed for high-detail textile print. Centered composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly drawn, amateur, low contrast, muddy colors, messy, out of focus
